image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: mRNA is more fragile than you think.
Context visual: It carries essential instructions for our cells, but it breaks down easily.
Escalation visual: So how does it survive long enough to do its job?
Evidence visual: Enter lipid nanoparticles—a protective shell that keeps mRNA intact.
Payoff visual: They ensure mRNA reaches cells safely, letting them learn and adapt.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into biotech? Hit follow for more insights!
